title: 募る想い、嗚呼届いていますか

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way back from an outing with Meisho
Doto when a poster catches my eye.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh... The shopping district is hosting a karaoke
competition. I didn't know they held events like
this.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
choice_data_list: Why not give it a shot?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! B-but, look—it says they're not taking
entries anymore!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
P-plus, I don't think my singing is anywhere near
competition level... Oogh...
choice_data_list: I know you'll make it with that voice of yours!
I know you'll make it with that voice of yours!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wha-whaaaa?! Y-you're embarrassing me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Although... this could be my chance to see if my
practicing has paid off.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I g-guess I'll give it a go...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, we decide to give the competition
a try.

text_block_list.name: Competition Coordinator
text_block_list.text:
Hm, a last-minute entry is going to be tough. We
can't provide you with a backing track at this
point.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
...U-um, well, I'm a... very flawed person. I'm not
confident... and I'm indecisive.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: ...But, many people say good things about my singing. My s-singing!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
That's wh-why, I would like for many more people
to hear my song... so I'm... facing my fears and...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! What am I talking about?! I'm s-sorry for
running my mouth!
choice_data_list: Please consider her as a candidate!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah! T-Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Competition Coordinator
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I hear you two loud and clear! If you're okay
going a cappella, then we'll be glad to have you
on.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: R-r-really?! Woooow... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It r-really is... I could have never approached the
stage on my own.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
It's all because of Urara, Shakur, and you,
Trainer. You three have made this a reality.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little s-scared, but... I promise to give this
my all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Meisho Doto takes to the stage as the
next singing candidate.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... I'm Meisho Doto, and I'll be sing—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sputter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Urk... s-sorry about that. I'm Meisho Doto, and...
and I'll be s-sing... singing today!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Hey... will she be all right?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Breathe in... and... out!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The sky above the bay... a shadow on the pier.
Bearing resemblance to you, tears strike my
eyes. ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Love and passion forsake me, I am alooone!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wow... you can really feel the lyrics!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I only now realize how quiet the audience has
been—they're all completely fixated on Meisho
Doto's voice. Her song must be really resonating
with them!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Where toooo? You say you will never...
retuuurn! ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Why, miss, that was an incredible performance!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, oh, ohhh! Wh... what an applause!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... Th-thank you for listening!
choice_data_list: You've got this in the bag.
You've got this in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... Th-thank you for listening!
choice_data_list: You've got this in the bag.
You've got this in the bag.

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Encore! Encore!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Not you too, Trainer, and... everyone else?!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, if you don't mind it, then... I'll d-do my best
to sing again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto performs for a second time, gaining
a little pep in her step!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I'm n-nothing special... really!

text_block_list.name: Competition Coordinator
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, your voice is incredible! We'd be honored
to have you for our next competition!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eep! Is th-that really okay?! Um... it would be my
pleasure!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto's singing has earned her a spot in
the next competition!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
You think I've... won?! There's n-no way when
there are... so many better singers here!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Well, you've got our vote, missy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! You all are b-b-being too n-nice to
someone like—Wha-whaah?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The winning contestants are selected from the
official entries. However, thanks to the audience's
support, Meisho Doto leaves with the special
award!
